---
title: "*Performance Science^2^*"
subtitle: | 
  **Philip Skotzke** \
  *Sport Sciencist | Coach | Researcher*
image: profile.jpg
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: "{{< iconify mdi:linkedin size=xl >}} LinkedIn"
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/philip-skotzke/
    - text: "{{< iconify academicons:researchgate-square size=xl >}} ResearchGate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Philip-Skotzke
    - text: "{{< iconify fa6-brands:square-bluesky size=xl >}} Bluesky"
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/philipskotzke.bsky.social
comments: false
---

{{< include _language_chooser.md >}}


Hi! I am **Philip** - sport scientist, coach and passionate athlete.

## Blog

The blog is the heart of my website. Here, I share medium-to-long format insights into scientific topics, training advice and much more.

::: text-center
[Go to the blog](posts/index.qmd){.link-box}
:::

## Coaching

No matter what goal you’re pursuing - I create **tailored training plans** and provide individual support to help you achieve it.

Whether it’s your first triathlon, a marathon personal best, or the famous "Ötztaler Radmarathon" - I’ll support you every step of the way.

::: text-center
[Learn more <img src="images/flag_de.svg" width="24">](coaching/index.qmd){.link-box-acc}
:::

## About me

Passion meets expertise. I combine **hands-on coaching experience** with scientific knowledge:

- PhD Student Sport Science/Exercise Physiology 
- M.Sc. High Performance Sport  
- Certified C-Level Triathlon Coach  
- Many years of experience in recreational, junior, and professional sport

Read about my motivation, my philosophy, and my passion for sport.

::: text-center
[Get to know me <img src="images/flag_de.svg" width="24">](about%20me/index.qmd){.link-box}
:::
